name: tikzjax-hebrew-local
description: Render TikZ diagrams in Obsidian using local LuaLaTeX with Hebrew support

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-tikzjax-tex-assets.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/validate-tikzjax-bundle.mjs

author: Sharbel Marshi
